g.text: Autonomous Site Reliability Engineering Agent Platform
Fault Types: memory-leak | cpu-spike | error-spike | dependency-failure | db-saturation | network-partition | cascading-failure | config-drift | cert-expiration
① Fault Injection: Dashboard → Backend → Microservice /fault/{type}
② Detection (Docker): Prometheus → AlertManager → Backend webhook
③ Detection (Local): Health Monitor polls /metrics + /health every 5s
④ Agent Trigger: Backend spawns LangGraph agent_app.invoke()
⑤ Telemetry: MLA collects logs, metrics, health from services
⑥ RCA: Diagnostics calls LLM for 6-step root cause analysis
⑧ Remediation: Executor runs restart/rollback/scale tools
⑨ Verification: Auditor waits 5s, checks health, LLM verify
⑩ Report: Auditor compiles Markdown post-mortem via LLM
⑫ Real-time: WebSocket pushes telemetry every 500ms
